title: Baby Towels with Hood - Ultra Soft Hooded Baby Bath Towel, Unique Animal Design for Boy & Girl, Blue Dog
features: Baby Soft Towels- Baby hooded towel made from soft and thick coral fleece, ultra absorbent helps keep baby dry and warm after bathing. These baby towels are great for newborn baby shower.
Durable and Perfect Size- Newborn baby towel is 80x80cm (30" x 30"), perfect size allows to fully and easily wrap your little ones, like a mother holding the baby in her arms, warm and comfortable.
Bath & Hooded Towels- Baby bath towels with hood helps you keep babies head warm. These baby towels can be used after bath, beach or pool. Cute animal design add more fun to babies bathing time.

Quality Material: Thick and soft coral fleece, none fluorescent, soft and skin-friendly to little ones, suitable to newborn to small toddler/infants. Baby towel is machine washable, avoid dry cleaning and ironing (A small amount of floating hair is normal, please wash it before use.)
Perfect for Baby Shower: Cute animal style and gender neutral design, baby hooded bath towel suitable for newborn baby boys and girls, is a perfect, useful essentials item for unisex newborn.
